title: Advanced Metals Expansion
description: Advanced Metals Expansion adds Chromium, Aluminium, Stainless Steel, Tungsten, and Titanium to Minecraft, introducing new ores, ingots, tools, armor, and industrial blocks for stronger progression and advanced crafting.
body:
Extension of Advanced Metals

With the Advanced Metals Expansion, you can mine, process, and craft a variety of real-world industrial metals in Minecraft.

With their own ores, ingots, blocks, and craft applications, chromium, aluminum, stainless steel, tungsten, and titanium are introduced in this mod. Stronger tools, more durable armor, and more sophisticated building materials are made possible by these metals, which also naturally fit into vanilla progression.

Features

♏️ The Overworld produces new ores (and deeper layers for rare metals)

🔩 Ores melted into alloys and ingots

🛡️ Titanium and tungsten armor sets that are stronger

⚔️ Robust and highly effective tools

🧱 Industrial and ornament                                                                                      

⚙️ Vanilla-friendly progression and balanceal metal b
